name: Lima Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the frozen lima beans in water according to packet instructions.
2. Steam the sliced carrots until tender. Drain and reserve the cooking water.
3. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Sauté the green onions and mushrooms until tender. Add basil, black pepper, and cayenne; sauté for an additional 1 minute.
4. In batches, blend the cooked lima beans, carrots, mushrooms, and reserved carrot cooking water with basil, pepper, and soy sauce using a blender until smooth.
5. Pour the blended mixture into a large soup pot. Add milk. Cook slowly for 15 to 20 minutes.
